title: setaria adhaerens subsp. verticillata
intro: Setaria adhaerens subsp. verticillata, also known as Bristle Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bristle Grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its aerial parts are used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
